title: Ultra Ores
body:
**_Ultra Ores_** is a content-rich expansion mod that introduces new ores, tool and armor sets, and custom wood-based building materials to enhance the progression and aesthetic diversity of Minecraft. The mod is fully compatible with Minecraft 1.21.4 using the NeoForge mod loader.

🧶 Wool Armor Set
Crafted from: minecraft:white_wool

Pieces:

Wool Helmet

Wool Chestplate

Wool Leggings

Wool Boots

Purpose: A lightweight armor option likely intended for early-game use or aesthetic purposes.

🔵 Lapis Lazuli Tool & Armor Set
Crafted from: minecraft:lapis_lazuli

Tools:

Lapis Sword

Lapis Pickaxe

Lapis Axe

Lapis Shovel

Lapis Hoe

Armor:

Lapis Helmet

Lapis Chestplate

Lapis Leggings

Lapis Boots

Repair Material: Lapis Lazuli

Unique Element: Gives new purpose to the otherwise underutilized Lapis gem.

🪨 Bedrock Tool & Armor Set
Crafted using: Smelted Bedrock Ore found underground

Items:

Bedrock Sword, Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel, Hoe

Bedrock Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, Boots

Repair Material: minecraft:bedrock

Ore Generation:

Spawns near bedrock level (Y=1–7)

Extremely rare (only 1 vein per chunk)

Power Fantasy: Allows crafting with Bedrock, traditionally unbreakable—very likely intended for late-game dominance.

🟣 Amethyst Tool Set
Crafted from: Amethyst Dust (likely dropped from blocks or ores)

Tools:

Amethyst Sword

Amethyst Pickaxe

Amethyst Axe

Amethyst Shovel

Amethyst Hoe

Repair Material: ultra_ores:amethyst_dust

Blocks:

Amethyst Block (decorative, also used in recipes)

🪙 Silver Ore + Full Set
New Content:

Silver Ore: World-generated block that drops silver when mined.

Silver Ingot: Smelted from silver ore.

Silver Block: Crafted from 9 ingots.

Tools:

Silver Sword

Silver Pickaxe

Silver Axe

Silver Shovel

Silver Hoe

Armor:

Silver Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, Boots

Repair Material: Silver Ingot

World Generation:

Spawns between Y=1 to Y=27

Up to 4 veins per chunk

Balance: Offers a mid-tier progression step between iron and diamond.

⚫ Obsidian Tool & Armor Set
Crafted from: minecraft:obsidian

Items:

Obsidian Sword, Pickaxe, Axe, Shovel, Hoe

Obsidian Helmet, Chestplate, Leggings, Boots

Repair Material: Obsidian

Use Case: High durability, likely intended for defensive or utility builds.


🧱 Other Features
Loot Tables for blocks are included for all new materials (e.g. ores drop their correct items).

Biome Modifiers ensure proper worldgen for Silver and Bedrock Ores.

Repair Tags: All tools and armor are properly tagged for repairability using their corresponding base materials.

🧾 Summary
Ultra Ores is a polished expansion mod aimed at:

Adding vertical progression through new material tiers (Silver, Obsidian, Bedrock, Amethyst, Lapis).

Providing a lightweight and fun addition in the form of Wool Armor.

Integrating seamlessly with vanilla mechanics via recipes, loot tables, and proper ore generation.
